title: Max FPS Lite
description: Max FPS but only with FPS mods! Customize your own pack for you to use!
body:
# Max FPS Lite
This Lite version of Max FPS aims to keep the FPS boost while removing any non-vanilla mods! You can add your own mods to improve your experience. Or if you just want a quick pvp client you can use [Max FPS](https://modrinth.com/modpack/maxfps1.8.9). You can download patcher yourself at [https://sk1er.club/mods/patcher](https://sk1er.club/mods/patcher)
<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>

Note: Only the mods which are in the latest version of this modpack will appear
